_comment: PLACEHOLDER GeoJSON file. This is NOT real province data. Replace with actual 81-province FeatureCollection before running the seed script. Original source URL in brief (https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ozdemirburak/il-iller/master/turkey.json) returned 404 at task execution time (2026-06-28). The repo could not be located on GitHub. Replace this file with a real source before running `npm run seed:regions`. Each Feature should have: properties.name (Turkish province name), properties.plate (1-81 plate code), properties.parentRegion (e.g. Akdeniz, Ege, Marmara), and geometry of type Polygon or MultiPolygon.
name: turkey-provinces
